data.title: Precision Optics Corporation, Inc. Announces Proposed Public Offering of Common Stock
data.description: In Gardner, Massachusetts, as of March 26, 2026, Precision Optics Corporation, Inc. (NASDAQ: POCI), known for designing and producing advanced optical instruments for medical and defense/aerospace sectors, revealed its intention to start an underwritten public offering of its common stock. The offering's progress depends on market conditions, making it uncertain whether or when the offering will finalize, along with the exact size or terms involved in the offering.

data.title: NurExone Strengthens U.S. Manufacturing Strategy Through Exo-Top Sublicense Agreement
data.description: Exo-Top Inc. has been established as a key subsidiary in the United States to bolster manufacturing, clinical progress, and to drive long-term value creation. This move is aimed at strengthening the company's foothold in the U.S. market and enhancing its overall strategic position. This strategic U.S. subsidiary is expected to play a pivotal role in advancing manufacturing processes and clinical developments, ultimately contributing to sustained value generation in the long run.

data.title: CROWN HOLDINGS, INC. APPOINTS DR. JOHN M. ROST EXECUTIVE VICE PRESIDENT AND CHIEF OPERATING OFFICER - ASIA PACIFIC AND TRANSIT PACKAGING
data.description: In Tampa, Florida on March 26, 2026, Crown Holdings, Inc. disclosed that Dr. John M. Rost is set to become the Executive Vice President and Chief Operating Officer for Asia Pacific and Transit Packaging starting from April 1, 2026. Dr. Rost, who presently holds the position of President, will be taking on this new role. Crown Holdings, Inc. is listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the symbol CCK.

data.title: Eisai and Nuvation Bio Announce Marketing Authorisation Application for Taletrectinib for the Treatment of Advanced ROS1-Positive Non-Small Cell Lung Cancer Validated by the European Medicines Agency
data.description: The Marketing Authorisation Application (MAA) has undergone validation and has been accepted for full approval review within a standard timeline. Furthermore, additional submissions are scheduled for the United Kingdom, Canada, and other territories covered by Eisai's licenses. Taletrectinib, which is already authorized in certain regions, will be subject to further filings in these aforementioned jurisdictions.

data.title: ICF Announces Timing of First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Conference Call
data.description: On Thursday, May 7, 2026 at 4:30 p.m. Eastern Time, an audio-only webcast will be held. Interested participants can access the webcast at https://edge.media-server.com/mmc/p/pw36jwo8. Registration for participants is available at https://register-conf.media-server.com/register/BIf3fcaa2693ad46d7b2190a7bc412bc8b. The event is organized by ICF and will take place in Reston, Va. This news was released on March 26, 2026 via PRNewswire.

data.title: Greenland Energy (NASDAQ: GLND) Appoints Joe Moglia, former TD Ameritrade CEO and Chairman, as Executive Advisor to the Board
data.description: Experienced financial and strategic expert joins Greenland Energy to provide guidance on Arctic development plans. With extensive experience in capital markets and global economics, the new advisory member is set to enhance the Company's operations. The announcement was made on March 26, 2026 in Houston. Greenland Energy, a leading player in the industry, is focused on its growth trajectory with the expertise of its newest team member.

data.title: Founder of venture firm offers reward to retrieve $42 million in stolen Bitcoin, crypto; bounty announced for assistance.
data.description: Bo Shen, a member of Fenbushi Capital, has announced a reward for individuals who assist in retrieving a portion of the $42 million that was stolen in the year 2022.

data.title: Steel City Hoops Shines the Spotlight on PA Basketball Great Mike Iuzzolino
data.description: Coach Mike Iuzzolino, a former NBA player and championship-winning coach, known as a legend at St. Francis, was recently honored in his hometown of Pittsburgh on March 26, 2026. His jersey was retired by his alma mater and he led his team to a PIAA championship. Iuzzolino's successful career and local basketball legacy have solidified his status as a notable figure in the sports community.

data.title: GetHealthy Launches Script, an AI-Enabled Platform Expanding Practitioner Commerce Beyond Supplements Across Seven Product Categories
data.description: GetHealthy, an infrastructure platform based in Austin, Texas, has introduced a new product called GetHealthy Script. This AI-enabled clinical scripting platform is aimed at assisting practitioners in providing comprehensive health protocols beyond just supplements. Unlike traditional dispensaries that restrict practitioners to recommending supplements from a single category, GetHealthy Script allows for multi-category protocols, including doctor-grade supplements, nutrition, and clean home products. This platform aims to enhance the overall health recommendations offered by practitioners.

data.title: MV Transportation Team Members Earn National Recognition in 2026 Lytx Coach and Driver of the Year Awards
data.description: In Dallas on March 26, 2026, MV Transportation revealed that two employees from their San Antonio, TX branch were honored in the 2026 Lytx Coach and Driver of the Year Awards. This recognition highlights their dedication to safety and leadership.

data.title: DaBella Celebrates Opening Day With Major League Baseball Partnerships Across Three Markets
data.description: A major home improvement company has joined forces with three baseball teams, the Colorado Rockies, Minnesota Twins, and Texas Rangers, for the upcoming 2026 season. With the baseball season kicking off on Opening Day, DaBella revealed its partnerships in Austin, Texas. This collaboration signifies a significant move by DaBella in connecting with sports enthusiasts across the country. The partnerships promise exciting opportunities for all involved parties.
